game_name: Chuck Rock II: Son of Chuck

special_mechanics.name: Club Attack
special_mechanics.description: Junior carries a club that gives his attacks further reach compared to the original Chuck Rock protagonist

special_mechanics.name: Rock-Moving Puzzles
special_mechanics.description: Occasional puzzle elements involving moving rocks throughout levels

feel_descriptors: loose control (Game Gear version per EGM)
stiff control (Sega CD version per EGM)
tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview and development notes but no precise physics parameters, movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system data. Control characteristics noted as variable across ports (loose vs stiff).
sources_used: Wikipedia: Chuck Rock II: Son of Chuck
